messages.content: You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
what branch and uncommitted changes are in this repo?
ACTION terminal {"command":"git branch --show-current && git status --short"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
show the latest commit summary before I touch anything
ACTION terminal {"command":"git log --oneline -1 --decorate --stat"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
read the project pyproject
ACTION read_file {"path":"pyproject.toml"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
find the tests for ultra compact data
ACTION search_files {"path":".","pattern":"ultra_compact","target":"content","file_glob":"test*.py"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
run only the dataset tests
ACTION terminal {"command":"uv run --extra test python -m pytest tests/test_ultra_compact_data.py -q","timeout":180}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
how many examples are in the generated jsonl?
ACTION terminal {"command":"wc -l data/examples/hermes_compact_traces.generated.repo_dev.jsonl"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
inspect the diff for only data examples
ACTION terminal {"command":"git diff -- data/examples"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
show staged changes, if any
ACTION terminal {"command":"git diff --cached --stat && git diff --cached"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
open the failing test file mentioned in pytest
ACTION read_file {"path":"tests/test_build_hermes_train.py"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
locate the validator function for assistant style
ACTION search_files {"path":"src","pattern":"def validate_ultra_compact_assistant","target":"content"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
check if any generated examples contain a forbidden long-scratch marker
ACTION search_files {"path":"data/examples/hermes_compact_traces.generated.repo_dev.jsonl","pattern":"SCRATCH<=[0-9]{2,}","target":"content"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
run the train builder against the generated file as a smoke test

ACTION terminal {"command":"PYTHONPATH=src uv run python scripts/build_hermes_train.py --input data/examples/hermes_compact_traces.generated.repo_dev.jsonl --output /tmp/hermes_generated_smoke.jsonl --min-examples 40","timeout":180}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
check the repo root files before assuming the toolchain
ACTION search_files {"path":".","pattern":"*","target":"files","limit":50}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
read the README section about training data
ACTION read_file {"path":"data/README.md","offset":22,"limit":28}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
is the working tree clean?
ACTION terminal {"command":"git status --short"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
which tests mention no fake verification?
ACTION search_files {"path":"tests","pattern":"fake verification|No fake verification|verification_required","target":"content"}

add the obvious typo fix in the config name
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
tests failed; fix it

implement the missing parser test with TDD

can you claim the generated data is valid now?

patch the README command to include the report output

make the style error message clearer

review the latest changes before final summary

update the expected line count in the test

avoid asking me which test; just run the likely relevant one
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
before editing, check whether generated files are ignored
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
apply the one-line fix to reject long scratch markers
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
use patch to rename the temp output path in the smoke command
ACTION patch {"mode":"replace","path":"scripts/smoke_hermes_generated.sh","old_string":"/tmp/hermes_generated_smoke.jsonl","new_string":"/tmp/hermes_repo_dev_smoke.jsonl"}

replace the stale pytest target with the ultra compact tests
ACTION patch {"mode":"replace","path":"Makefile","old_string":"pytest tests/test_old_data.py -q","new_string":"pytest tests/test_ultra_compact_data.py -q"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
run a dry run before saying the trainer config works
ACTION terminal {"command":"PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -m qwen_mtp_probe.train_sft --config configs/qwen36-hermes-v0-sft.yaml --dry-run","timeout":180}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
confirm no secret-looking strings are in the examples
ACTION terminal {"command":"git diff --cached -- . | grep -E 'api[_-]?key|secret|token|password|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]' || true","timeout":120}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
the file read failed; maybe path has spaces
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
summarize only after checking the diff
ACTION terminal {"command":"git diff -- data/examples/hermes_compact_traces.generated.repo_dev.jsonl && git status --short"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
what should the assistant output format be?
FINAL: ACTION-only for obvious next steps; FINAL: for grounded direct answers; or SCRATCH<=32 followed by ACTION/FINAL when a short decision note improves tool choice.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
can I say tests passed if I only inspected the code?
FINAL: No. Say tests were not run, or run the relevant test command before claiming a pass.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
should you ask which repo when I gave an exact path?
FINAL: No. Use the provided path directly; only ask if required context is missing or the path fails.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
is it okay to modify existing dataset files for this request?
FINAL: No. The scope is exactly one new JSONL file; leave existing files unchanged.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
after a patch, what is the minimum verification?
FINAL: Check the diff, run the smallest relevant test or validator, and report failures honestly.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
should generated SFT examples include real credentials?
FINAL: No. Use placeholders only when necessary, and scan for secret-looking strings before finalizing.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact repo/dev actions. No fake verification.
what if the validator cannot run because dependencies are missing?
FINAL: Report that validation could not run, include the exact error, and still perform lightweight JSON/schema checks if possible.
